name: doc-find-all
title: Doc Inventory Scan
description: Inventory documentation files, classify their status, and expose orphan, duplicate, or stale docs before curation. Use when the immediate job is inventory, not rewriting docs yet.
purpose: Create an evidence-backed documentation inventory before curation or refresh work.
when_to_use: Need to know which docs are active, stale, duplicate, or orphaned.
Need a bounded documentation inventory before curation.
Need evidence before recommending merges, moves, or deletes.
do_not_use: Need to write the README or guide content directly.
The target scope contains no documentation set to inventory.

required_inputs.name: INVENTORY_GOAL
required_inputs.description: Why the inventory is being created.

input_contract_notes: TARGET_SCOPE should be a real documentation set, not a broad repo area with no docs boundary.
INVENTORY_GOAL should explain why the inventory is being created so stale, duplicate, and coverage signals can be prioritized correctly.

structured_outputs.name: DOC_INVENTORY
structured_outputs.description: Document records with status and evidence.

structured_outputs.name: ORPHAN_OR_DUPLICATE_SET
structured_outputs.description: Docs that appear stale, orphaned, or duplicated.

output_contract_notes: DOC_INVENTORY should distinguish observed status from inferred cleanup priority.
ORPHAN_OR_DUPLICATE_SET may be empty when the current doc set is clean enough.
NEXT_CURATION_TARGETS should stay bounded to the immediate next doc work instead of a generic backlog.
neutrality_rules: Read docs before classifying them stale or duplicate.
Keep delete or archive conclusions tentative until evidence is explicit.
Separate navigation problems from content-quality problems.
execution_constraints: Do not rewrite docs from this skill; inventory only.
Keep stale or duplicate classifications tied to explicit evidence such as overlap, missing links, or outdated references.
Prefer the smallest useful inventory that supports the stated inventory goal.
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit | scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs},deterministic-output | lens: nielsen-norman | output: md(contract=v1)]
lens_rationale: Doc inventory should focus on discoverability, duplication, and navigation gaps.
